segments.text: To Joker, who can access the long-range game too
segments.original_text: 遠距離戦も選べるジョーカーということで

segments.text: With spells like Begirama and Ionazun
segments.original_text: ベギラマとかイオナズンみたいな
遠距離呪文をしっかり選ぶ

segments.text: And mixing up the pace as well
segments.original_text: 速度も変えてきてるんですけど

full_text: Out of the inside airdodge But you know what Character switch To Joker, who can access the long-range game too With spells like Begirama and Ionazun Really committing to those projectiles And mixing up the pace as well Yeah Right

corrections.original: ベギラーマとかヨナズみたいな
corrections.corrected: ベギラマとかイオナズンみたいな

corrections.original: 遠距離指紋をしっかり選ぶ
corrections.corrected: 遠距離呪文をしっかり選ぶ
corrections.rule: Kanji homophone correction (指紋 → 呪文)
